### ?? FILE PURPOSE
An open, unfiltered sandbox for raw brainstorming. There are no bad ideas here during Week 1.
*   **How to use:** Dump every single concept generated by the team or sparked by Claude here. Categorize them broadly by terminal operations, cabin behavior, or communication style.
